entries.summary: Initial brain save. Phase 01 + 02 committed. Phase 03 code complete but uncommitted.
project_changes: Phase 01: NestJS project init, Prisma, Supabase config (750efb7)
Phase 02: Database schema (11 tables), Supabase JWT auth (b96af61)
Phase 03: Tenant + Agent CRUD with RBAC (uncommitted)

commits.message: chore: init monorepo - AI Automation Suite
feat(be): Phase 02 - Database schema, Prisma, Auth module

working_tree.summary: Phase 03 fully implemented. 14 new files, 13 modified.

decisions: Use sellerId (not authId/sub) as identity key for service queries
AuthenticatedUser.sellerId is required (Strategy always auto-creates Seller)
Controllers use inline type { sellerId: string } (TS isolatedModules constraint)
TenantGuard attaches tenant + membership to request

entries.summary: Phase 03 committed. Working tree clean. Brain files included in commit for cross-machine portability.
project_changes: Phase 03 committed: Tenant + Agent CRUD, RBAC, DTOs, Guards (421a13d)
Project knowledge base doc created in docs/
Brain files (.brain/) added to repo for portability

commits.message: feat(be): Phase 03 - Tenant & Agent CRUD with RBAC

decisions: Brain files committed to Git for cross-machine usage
Branch renamed from master to main
open_questions: Tenant.settings DTO - add in Phase 10 or earlier?
HNSW index needs manual SQL (Prisma db push does not support)
